text: Key risks warrant careful consideration. Regulatory uncertainty remains elevated following the U.S. government and majority of U.S. states filing an appeal in the landmark antitrust case against Google's search business in February 2026, after a 2024 federal court ruling found Google holds a monopoly in online search. Revenue concentration in the Google Services segment, which includes advertising products across Search and YouTube, creates dependence on advertising market health and macroeconomic conditions. Additionally, the rapid evolution in generative AI presents technology disruption risk, requiring continued substantial R&D investment to maintain competitive positioning. Investors should monitor antitrust litigation developments, advertising market trends, and AI competitive dynamics when evaluating this position.
